ground_truth.main_content: State of the Blockchain 2025: Market Review & Outlook. Explore the narratives shaping ten major blockchains in 2025 and 2026, from CoinDesk Research. Protocol Research. This comprehensive report examines the key trends, market dynamics, and future outlook across major blockchain networks.
